sizing_rule.note: Increase position size up to 1.5x multiplier (or max 50% above base) after 4+ consecutive wins, when unrealized equity gain ≥15% and drawdown from peak ≤30%. Primary trigger is winning streak; secondary conditions provide safety limits.

source_rule_text: Increase position size during winning streaks and after profitable trades, but within defined limits, to capitalize on momentum while managing drawdown recovery risk.
